query: SELECT concat(p.name, ' | ', pv.name, ' | SKU: ', pv.sku, ' | Code: ', COALESCE(pv.supplierProductCode, 'N/A'), ' | EAN: ', COALESCE(pv.ean13, 'N/A'), ' | Stock: ', pv.stockQuantity, ' | Transit: ', pv.inTransitQuantity) as info FROM product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id WHERE pv.stockQuantity > 0 OR pv.inTransitQuantity > 0 ORDER BY p.name, pv.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute SELECT concat(p.name, ' | ', pv.name, ' | SKU: ', pv.sku, ' | Code: ', COALESCE(pv.supplierProductCode, 'N/A'), ' | EAN: ', COALESCE(pv.ean13, 'N/A'), ' | Stock: ', pv.stockQuantity, ' | Transit: ', pv.inTransitQuantity) as info FROM product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id WHERE pv.stockQuantity > 0 OR pv.inTransitQuantity > 0 ORDER BY p.name, pv.name;
